text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On one of our days off, Symboli Rudolf and I go
out in search of some skin cream.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No such luck... I should have expected as much.
This brand only ships by direct order.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Usually I track how much I have left and order
more before I run out...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But Teio insisted on trying some, and it seems I
gave her more than I intended.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
She seemed so delighted with one bottle, I
couldn't resist giving her more...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And now I am breaking out. The price of my own
negligence, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems as if Symboli Rudolf is having skincare
troubles.
